sections.heading: What we collect
sections.body: Your profile (name, currency, and any employee/department details you add), the receipts and reports you create, and — if you enable notifications — a device token used to deliver them.

sections.heading: How we use it
sections.body: Only to run the app for you: reading receipts with AI, syncing your data across your devices, showing your spending, and sending notifications you've allowed.

sections.heading: Where it's stored
sections.body: Your data is stored in our Supabase database, scoped so only you can read it; receipt images are stored in Cloudflare R2. Some processing happens on your device.

sections.heading: Third parties
sections.body: We use Apple (sign-in, subscriptions, push), an AI provider to read receipts, Supabase (database & functions), and Cloudflare (image storage). We don't sell your data or use it for advertising.

sections.heading: Your choices
sections.body: You can edit or delete your data, or delete your entire account, from Profile at any time. Deleting your account permanently removes your data.

sections.heading: Retention
sections.body: We keep your data until you delete it or close your account.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: Questions about privacy? Reach us through Contact us in the app, or email support@snaptract.app.
